scripts.build: npm run build:data && npm run build:content
scripts.pack: npm run build && cd chrome-extension && npx bestzip ../chrome-extension-store.zip .
scripts.test: npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:adversarial && npm run build && node --experimental-strip-types --test "tests/unit/*.test.mjs" "tests/regression/*.test.mjs"
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:content && node tests/integration/extension.test.cjs && node tests/integration/injected-chart-animation.test.cjs && node tests/integration/macedonian-silver.test.cjs && node tests/integration/army-icons.test.cjs && node tests/integration/summary-plus-features.test.cjs && node tests/integration/uncached-colors-fallback.test.cjs
